publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-09-07 18:04:05 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Sound recordings and other materials used or produced by the Language Resource Center or otherwise related to their teaching of language at Cornell University.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: The Language Resource Center is a unit in Cornell University's College of Arts and Sciences that supports language teaching and learning.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Sound recordings and other materials used or produced by the Language Resource Center or otherwise related to their teaching of language at Cornell University.

userestrict.head: Restrictions on Use:
userestrict.p: Due to the fragility and potential degradation of moving image and sound recordings, viewing and listening is limited to items that have been digitized. If an item is in another media format, you may request to have the item digitized for access. Information on ordering access copies may be found on our Reproductions and Permissions page.
Many of these items have been digitized by the Language Resource Center.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Language Resource Center collection, #14-18-4271. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

separatedmaterial.head: Separated Materials
separatedmaterial.p: These titles were removed from the collection can be found by searching the Cornell University Library catalog:

Agard, Frederick B. Modern Approach to Spanish, 1968 Brown, J. Marvin. A.U.A. Language Center Thai Course. Part 2, 1968 Fairbanks, Gorden H. Colloquial Sinhalese (Sinhala) Part 1, 1981 Jorden, Elenor Harz. Beginning Japanese. Part 2, 1963 Jorden, Elenor Harz. Japenese: The Spoken Langusge. Part 2, 1988 Sablo-Yates, Maria Puntos de Partida: An Invitation to Spanish (Laboratory manual) Third edition, 1989 Wolff, John U. Beginning Indonesian. Part 1, 1971 Wolff, John U. Beginning Indonesian. Part 2, 1979

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Guide has been arranged by series as designated by XXX when known.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: LRC # refers to the numbering system used by the Language Resource Center and can be searched in the catalogs. TR numbers have been given by the Rare and Manuscript Collection as preservation numbers although the tapes have not been physically numbered.
